content.text:
<analysis>
a. Summarize the event type and context:
This is a pull request review request. The PR "Add comprehensive descriptions and supporting evidence to gene annotations" by cmungall adds documentation and evidence support for Drosophila gene annotations, particularly heat shock proteins. The PR has 311 additions, 9 deletions across 10 files.

b. Determine if this is a request for code review feedback or for implementation:
This is explicitly a request for code review feedback. The direct prompt asks me to review the PR and provide feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. List key information from the provided data:
- PR modifies 9 YAML files in genes/DROME/ directory for various genes (Buffy, Ced-12, Edem2, Hsp22, Hsp23, Hsp26, Hsp27, Hsp83, Nmnat)
- Adds 1 new validation report file (reports/validation-DROME.tsv)
- Main changes include adding gene descriptions, core functions, supporting evidence citations, and annotation reviews
- Focus on heat shock proteins with detailed molecular function documentation
- All changes appear to be data/documentation additions rather than code changes

d. Outline the main tasks and potential challenges:
- Review the YAML structure and content for consistency with schema
- Check citation formatting and reference accuracy
- Evaluate the quality and appropriateness of gene function descriptions
- Assess the evidence support for annotations
- Review the validation report for completeness
- Check for any potential data quality issues

e. Propose a high-level plan of action:
1. Read the schema file to understand expected structure
2. Review each modified gene file for data quality and consistency
3. Check the validation report for any issues
4. Provide comprehensive feedback on documentation quality, data accuracy, and best practices
5. No build/test steps needed as this appears to be pure data/documentation
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review Analysis I'll review this pull request for code quality, best practices, potential issues, performance considerations, security concerns, and test coverage. #### Review Checklist: - [ ] Read project schema and guidelines - [ ] Review modified gene annotation files for data quality - [ ] Check citation formatting and reference accuracy - [ ] Evaluate gene function descriptions for scientific accuracy - [ ] Review validation report - [ ] Assess overall consistency and best practices - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback Starting analysis now... --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/22688779590)
